title: Sony confirms the end of physical discs on PlayStation and rations sales of external disc drives
summary: The company announces a reduction in disc production and limits the purchase of external disc units to one per customer, as the closure of the PS3 store advances the digital transition.

title: New consoles and PC handhelds: competitors to Steam Deck and Asus ROG Ally
summary: Devices are launched such as the all-terrain handheld from Steam Deck's first rivals, the Asus ROG Ally Xbox X positions itself as good value for money, and the Steam Machine presents technical issues.

title: Sony blocks PlayStation games on PC in 132 countries due to PSN requirement
summary: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls and other titles cannot be purchased in 132 countries due to the requirement to link a PlayStation Network account.

title: Persona 4 Revival presents its trailer at Anime Expo 2026
summary: During Anime Expo 2026, the trailer for Rise Kujikawa was shown and new details were revealed about the return of Persona 4.

title: Solo Leveling releases KARMA trailer and announces Beyond the System movie
summary: The Solo Leveling franchise reveals a combat trailer for the KARMA game and confirms the Beyond the System movie, which will serve as the third season.

title: David Gaider seeks funding for a heist RPG with humor
summary: The creator of the Dragon Age universe presents his new project, a heist RPG that could be decisive for his studio's viability.

title: Mod community releases content for Morrowind and a charity mission for Fallout 4
summary: New mods for Morrowind inspired by Final Fantasy are published, along with a charity mission for Fallout 4 featuring actor Wes Johnson.

title: New performance details of Dragon Quest XI S on Switch 2 and announcement of Hatsune Miku Starry Party
summary: The resolution and performance of Dragon Quest XI S on Switch 2 are revealed, the party game Hatsune Miku Starry Party is announced for Switch 2 and PC, and the Snack Box Micro controller is analyzed.

title: New seasons of Bleach and Black Clover, plus Jaadugar anime and a film from the Your Name artist
summary: Bleach returns with its final arc, Black Clover returns with a new season, the Jaadugar anime premieres, and a film from the creator of Your Name is released in 2026.

title: Articles explore Final Fantasy's secret and the legacy of Final Fantasy 4
summary: Two analyses highlight a hidden vampire story in Final Fantasy and the unique achievements of Final Fantasy 4 on its 35th anniversary.

title: Experts doubt GTA 6 will reach 60 fps on consoles
summary: Analysts consider it unlikely that Grand Theft Auto 6 will achieve 60 frames per second on current-generation consoles.

title: Danganronpa 2×2 delayed, its creator suggests playing GTA 6 in the meantime
summary: Danganronpa 2×2 suffers a surprise delay, and the creator jokes that fans can play GTA 6 to pass the time.

title: Players investigate if Marvel Rivals reduced the bulge in Captain America's suit
summary: The community speculates about a possible design change in Captain America's suit in Marvel Rivals regarding the character's bulge.

title: Guilty Gear: Strive will have a guest character as downloadable content this winter
summary: The arrival of a new guest character is announced for Guilty Gear: Strive as DLC for this winter season.

title: Scrap Mechanic leaves early access with version 1.0 after more than ten years
summary: The robotic survival game Scrap Mechanic finally releases its complete version after over a decade in early access.

title: Escape from Tarkov creator promises the most realistic sci-fi shooter for 2026
summary: Nikita Buyanov talks about his new shooter, promising unprecedented realism and a release in 2026.

title: Sega shows a preview of the new Sonic animated short
summary: Sega shares a brief look at the upcoming Sonic the Hedgehog animated short.

title: Nintendo talks about its plans to connect players with the past through Switch Online
summary: Nintendo discusses how Switch Online allows players to access classic titles and keep nostalgia alive.

title: Global Offensive breaks player records since becoming independent from Counter-Strike 2
summary: The standalone version of Global Offensive reaches historical concurrent player numbers despite CS2's dominance on Steam.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved assures it will be available on disc even on PS5
summary: The game Halo: Campaign Evolved promises that PS5 users will be able to purchase a physical copy despite the trend towards digital.
